entries.description: Automate form submissions at scale with Browserbase. Handle logins, registrations, data entry, and checkouts using Stagehand or Playwright in reliable cloud browsers.

entries.title: Automated testing
entries.description: Run reliable end-to-end browser tests at scale with Browserbase. Automate login flows, UI validation, and regression testing using Stagehand or Playwright.

entries.title: Buying with an AI agent
entries.description: Automate purchasing workflows with AI-powered agents and browser automation

entries.title: Web data retrieval
entries.description: Extract structured data from any website at scale with Browserbase. Use Stagehand or Playwright with Verified, proxy rotation, and CAPTCHA solving.

entries.title: What is Browserbase?
entries.description: The complete platform to build and deploy agents that browse and interact with the web like humans.

entries.title: Start your first session with Playwright
entries.description: Connect Playwright to Browserbase cloud browsers in minutes. Run headless browser automation at scale with session recording and debugging.

entries.title: Start your first session with Puppeteer
entries.description: Connect Puppeteer to Browserbase cloud browsers. Run headless Chrome automation at scale with built-in session management and debugging.

entries.title: Start your first session with Selenium
entries.description: Connect Selenium WebDriver to Browserbase cloud browsers. Run cross-browser automation at scale with session recording and observability.

entries.title: Skills
entries.description: Give your AI coding agent a browser in one prompt

entries.title: Stagehand
entries.description: Build browser agents with Stagehand + Browserbase
